title: offline-sync — published events
description: Mobile / desktop offline-first sync substrate. Every device tracks its own outbox + inbox; conflicts resolved by last-writer-wins with client-timestamp OR merge strategy per aggregate.

events.name: SyncDeviceRegistered
events.trigger: New SyncDevice row. Device registered with server + granted a client_id.

events.name: SyncBatchReceived
events.trigger: Client pushed a batch of outbox ops to server.

events.name: SyncOpApplied
events.trigger: Server successfully applied one op from a batch. HIGH VOLUME.

events.name: SyncConflictDetected
events.trigger: P1 event. Op conflicted with server state. Resolution strategy applied per aggregate.

events.name: SyncOpRejected
events.trigger: P0 event. Op rejected — authz failure OR aggregate-not-found OR tenant-boundary breach.
